en: We were saved because of you.
We were given a miracle because of you.
We are a family because of you.
I'm part of the amazing Madrigals.
I believe that we can be Kumandra again.
ko: 우리가 다시 쿠만드라가 될 수 있다고 믿어.

en: I still believe we can be Kumandra again.
ko: 우리가 다시 쿠만드라가 될 수 있다고 아직도 믿어.

en: Remember me, though I have to say goodbye.
If I want to be a musician, I need a musician's blessing.
We've got to find my great-great grandpa.
